title: Key Management
description: Mengelola key: expiry, rename, pattern search, dan operasi umum lainnya.

commands.name: KEYS / SCAN
commands.title: Mencari Key
commands.syntax:
KEYS pattern
SCAN cursor [MATCH pattern] [COUNT count] [TYPE type]
commands.examples:
KEYS *
KEYS user:*
KEYS session:*

# SCAN (production-safe)
SCAN 0 MATCH user:* COUNT 100
SCAN 0 TYPE string

# Pattern: ? = satu karakter, * = banyak
KEYS h?llo  # hello, hallo, hxllo
KEYS h*llo  # hllo, heeello
commands.warning: KEYS blocking dan lambat pada dataset besar! Gunakan SCAN di production.

commands.name: EXPIRE / TTL / PERSIST
commands.title: Key Expiry (TTL)
commands.description: Mengatur, melihat, dan menghapus waktu kedaluwarsa key.
commands.syntax:
EXPIRE key seconds
PEXPIRE key milliseconds
EXPIREAT key unix-timestamp
TTL key
PTTL key
PERSIST key

options.description: Sisa waktu dalam detik (-1 = no expiry, -2 = not exists)

commands.examples:
SET session "data"
EXPIRE session 3600      # 1 jam
TTL session              # sisa detik
PTTL session             # sisa milidetik
PERSIST session          # hapus expiry

EXPIREAT session 1735689600  # expire di timestamp tertentu
commands.notes: TTL return -1 jika key ada tapi tanpa expiry, -2 jika key tidak ada.

commands.name: DEL / UNLINK / EXISTS
commands.title: Menghapus dan Mengecek Key
commands.description: Menghapus key dan mengecek keberadaan key.
commands.syntax:
DEL key [key ...]
UNLINK key [key ...]
EXISTS key [key ...]
TYPE key

options.description: Tipe data key (string, list, set, zset, hash)

commands.examples:
DEL user:1
DEL key1 key2 key3
UNLINK big_key         # hapus async
EXISTS user:1          # 1 atau 0
EXISTS key1 key2 key3  # return jumlah yang ada
TYPE user:1            # "hash"
commands.notes: Gunakan UNLINK untuk key besar agar tidak blocking Redis.

commands.name: RENAME / COPY / DUMP
commands.title: Rename, Copy, dan Serialisasi Key
commands.description: Mengganti nama, menyalin, dan serialisasi key.
commands.syntax:
RENAME key newkey
RENAMENX key newkey
COPY source destination [REPLACE]
DUMP key
RESTORE key ttl serialized-value

options.description: Ganti nama hanya jika newkey belum ada

commands.examples:
RENAME old_key new_key
RENAMENX temp_key final_key
COPY user:1 user:1:backup
COPY user:1 user:1:clone REPLACE

DUMP user:1
RESTORE user:1:copy 0 "\x00\x03..."
commands.notes: RENAME adalah atomic. Jika newkey sudah ada, akan ditimpa.
